task_objective: Add a find command that routes numeric queries to appid lookup and non-numeric queries to fuzzy name lookup.
design_decisions: Implement find as a lightweight command shape on the existing argparse parser.
Treat digits-only queries as appid lookups.
Treat every other query as fuzzy name lookup.
Reuse existing JSON output fields for appid and fuzzy lookup paths.
results: Targeted red tests failed before implementation because find was unrecognized and absent from help.
./run.sh uv run ruff format . passed after reformatting 1 file.
./run.sh uv run ty check src/ passed.
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 41 tests.
